TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_P‚Äôanoh, title = P‚Äôanoh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/P‚Äôanoh} }

S.FORM: alang P'anoh ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 155 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 147 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, saySiyat 8%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na P'anoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na P'anoh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na P'anoh hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya' ga Sinpitu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang P'anoh ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 48 buwan, 155 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 147 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 83%, saySiyat 8%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na P'anoh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na P'anoh hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na P'anoh hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na P'anoh hya' ga Sinpitu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč p Ēanońß …£a nija mki s~…ēku ő≤jori keŇč atu s~…ēitan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, ő≤unun *%, s~…ēetik *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran ru kjokaj. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na p Ēanońß ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na p Ēanońß ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na p Ēanońß ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na p Ēanońß ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēllaw na p Ēanońß ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēinpitu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
